displayProperties.name: Upgrade Armor
displayProperties.description:
Change this armor's energy type to Stasis.

This action will not change this armor's energy capacity.

Materials and currencies used previously on this armor will not be refunded.

displayProperties.name: Force Multiplier
displayProperties.description: Shotgun and melee final blows start your health regeneration. While you have a defensive buff (Void Overshield, Amplified, Restoration, Frost Armor, Woven Mail), your Shotguns and melees deal additional damage and final blows with either extend the duration of those buffs. Provides a moderate benefit to Shotgun airborne effectiveness and reload speed.

displayProperties.name: Praxic Lift
displayProperties.description:
You gain an air move jetpack. Weapon and Arc powered melee final blows build up Jetpack Fuel.

While airborne, [Air Dodge] : Charge your jetpack.

On release, activate your jetpack with a forceful blast of exhausting Arc energy then fly forward a short distance based on the amount charged. Collide with a combatant to unleash a blinding blast of energy and gain a temporary bonus to your melee stat.
